metadata.description: Anti-sycophancy behavioral modes for Claude Code - direct, verification-driven personas for coding, logic, creative, brainstorming, security, debugging, architecture, writing, decisions, data, and knowledge-curation work.

plugins.name: candor
plugins.description: Twelve behavioral skills (a shared anti-sycophancy core plus eleven work-mode personas) that make Claude more direct, verification-driven, and efficient.
